prompt: I want to post about something that happened in a customer meeting yesterday. The CISO of a large healthcare company asked me: 'We're starting to use AI agents for clinical workflows. What happens when the AI agent accesses a patient record — who's accountable?' I didn't have a crisp answer and had to come back to them. The answer is about identity governance for non-human identities and audit trails. Want to make this into a LinkedIn post.

assertions.name: hook-uses-vulnerability-or-question
assertions.description: Post opens with the CISO's question or the 'I didn't have a crisp answer' admission — not a generic intro about AI in healthcare

assertions.name: no-em-dash
assertions.description: Post body contains no em dashes (—)

assertions.name: ends-with-specific-question
assertions.description: Post ends with a specific, discussion-inviting question (not just a statement)

assertions.name: prose-not-numbered-list
assertions.description: Core answer is delivered in prose, not as a numbered 1-2-3 list (which feels like a slide deck)

assertions.name: proper-hashtags
assertions.description: Includes 3-5 hashtags in # format, not pipe-separated labels
